name: zeffect_set_conditional_ref_pos
description: zEffect::SetConditionalRefPos stores the conditional reference point and enables conditional distance checks.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?SetConditionalRefPos@zEffect@@YIXPBUzVec3@@@Z at 0x458af0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 35 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke verifies the enabled flag, stored XYZ reference position, null distance fallback, and distance-squared calculation from a node world position.
